/CAL  PTC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUT, 2  PC 490,2, A MISD, IS GRANTED,/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT, 3, PC 242, A MISD, IS GRANTED,/FAWA/IRR/    /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 23/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CTORD:ACM TERMINATED/OR/DEF:IS ORDEREDRELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LDTR:10-12-18/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/VD:08-14-18 HEARING/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & PROOF OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/LDPX:08-03-18//CTORD:THE GPS DEVICE THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM REMOVED/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
